title: stipa × majalis subsp. setulosissima
intro: Stipa × majalis subsp. setulosissima, also known as the alpine stipa, is a subspecies of grass native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The alpine stipa is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
